name: NutshellConnector
description: Connects to the Nutshell SMB sales CRM via its JSON-RPC 2.0 API to read and manage contacts, leads, accounts, activities, and users. Authenticates with HTTP Basic (login email + API key).

install_fields.label: Nutshell Login Email
install_fields.help: Your Nutshell login email — used as the HTTP Basic username when calling the JSON-RPC API.

install_fields.label: Nutshell API Key
install_fields.placeholder: Paste the API key from Nutshell → Setup → API Keys
install_fields.help: Generate from Nutshell → Setup → API Keys. Stored encrypted and used as the HTTP Basic password.

install_fields.label: Nutshell API Base URL
install_fields.help: JSON-RPC endpoint. Leave blank to use the public production URL.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum requests per minute. Nutshell's standard tier is 60 RPM; reduce if you share the key across services.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates email + api_key and calls getUser to confirm credentials. Saves config and marks the connector connected on success.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Nutshell API connectivity by calling the JSON-RPC getUser method.

apis.name: List Contacts
apis.description: Page through Nutshell contacts. Supports server-side ordering (default lastName) and an optional query filter.

apis.name: Get Contact
apis.description: Fetch a single contact by Nutshell ID. Optionally pin the specific revision via contact_rev.

apis.name: Create Contact
apis.description: Create a new contact. The body follows Nutshell's contact schema (name object, email[], phone[], accounts[]).

apis.name: Update Contact
apis.description: Patch a contact. Nutshell uses optimistic locking; the current rev string is required.

apis.name: Delete Contact
apis.description: Delete a contact by ID + rev.

apis.name: List Leads
apis.description: Page through Nutshell leads with an optional Nutshell query filter object.

apis.name: Create Lead
apis.description: Create a new lead. The body follows Nutshell's lead schema (description, primaryAccount, contacts[], value).

apis.name: List Activities
apis.description: Page through Nutshell activities (calls, meetings, notes).

apis.name: Log Activity
apis.description: Create a new activity record (call / meeting / note) on a Nutshell lead or contact.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: Return all Nutshell users — useful for assigning leads or filtering activities by owner.
